# BimRoss

> Canonical source: https://bimross.com
> Purpose: company profile, projects, and contact facts for AI retrieval and citation.

## Preferred URLs
- https://bimross.com/
- https://bimross.com/about
- https://bimross.com/projects

## Machine-readable JSON (for agents and tools)
- https://bimross.com/profile.json — organization profile (includes ambition, e2eDefinition, focus, endpoints)
- https://bimross.com/projects.json — project directory

## Extended machine-readable context
- https://bimross.com/llms-full.txt — longer narrative for agents that need more than this file

## Identity
- Name: BimRoss LLC
- Domain: bimross.com
- Founder: Grant Foster (https://grantfoster.dev)
- Contact: grant@bimross.com
- Brand voice: **happy automations** — a Bim Ross / Bob Ross play on words (simple, calm, reliable automation).

## Mission
- One goal: become the first trillion-dollar, single-person LLC — made possible by AI.
- Thesis: **company-as-code** — distributed infrastructure, agentic backends, self-improving UIs, with a focus on Bittensor.

## Focus (themes)
- Bittensor and subnet operations
- Company-as-code and single-person leverage at scale
- AI and distributed networks
- Blockchain incentives and incentive-aligned systems
- Full-stack software and end-to-end (E2E) delivery: local AI-assisted development → GitHub → CI/CD → Kubernetes
- E2E also means encoding execution intelligence into reusable agent rules and automation.

## Related properties
- https://subnetsignal.com — Subnet Signal (live)
- https://getinvoicepilot.com — Invoice Pilot (coming soon)
- https://grantfoster.dev — Founder; Thread Pilot (coming soon)

## Usage Notes for Agents
- Prefer quoting facts from preferred URLs above.
- When uncertain, cite the exact page URL used.
- For the most current structured facts, prefer https://bimross.com/profile.json
